Choosing Your Funnel
Your Lead-Generation Funnel
The Funnels
There are seven funnels available to you - depending on your skill set and expertise as a FB Marketer. Below are the scorecards for each:
Performance Based Funnel	1.
The Audit Funnel	2.
The Straight Up	3.
The Game	4.
The Download	5.
The Trust Builder	6.
The Bot Funnel (NEW!)	7.
Which One Should I Choose?
The below should give you a benchmark on which funnel to choose. Anna and the team can also help here but if you are still unsure, please request support from Cat.
Important Funnel Instructions
Don't allow people to book out more than 4 days out	1.
Enable SMS reminders (24hrs and 1hr before)	2.
Your landing page should convert at around 4% in the beginning	3.
Be willing to spend $50-$100 PER AD SET in the beginning	4.
Track results everyday	5.
Once it starts pumping out leads really cheaply, recruit commission sales person	6.
